summary: Project with profile page and API key integration. Adding Google/Gmail ID sign-in/joining feature.

existing_features.title: Implement Google Sign-In on the Login page so users can authenticate using their Gmail/Google account via the existing Google Identity Services (GSI) script already loaded in index.html. On successful Google sign-in, if the user has no existing profile, open the ProfileSetupModal pre-filled with the Google account's name and email data. If a profile already exists, navigate the user to the home page.

Implement Google Sign-Up on the Signup page so new users can create an account by joining with their Gmail/Google ID. On successful Google authentication for a new user, open the ProfileSetupModal pre-filled with data from the Google JWT (name, profile picture URL) to complete channel setup.

Update the ProfileSetupModal component to accept optional pre-fill props (displayName, avatarUrl) sourced from Google auth data. When these props are provided, pre-populate the channel name input and attempt to display the Google profile picture as the initial avatar preview.

Update the Layout/navbar component to display the authenticated Google user's profile picture and display name when signed in via Google (useGoogleAuth hook). Clicking the avatar should navigate to the Profile page. Show a sign-in button when no Google session and no Internet Identity session is active.

new_feature_requests.summary: Google/Gmail ID sign-in and account joining
